subject: [PATCH v5 19/21] swap: simplify swapoff using virtual swap

2026-03-20.patch_summary: This patch simplifies and optimizes the swapoff process by utilizing virtual swap slots stored at page table entries, eliminating the need for a page table walk. Instead of traversing all VMAs, it iterates through allocated swap slots on the swapfile, finds their corresponding virtual swap slots, and faults them in. This results in cleaner code and a performance improvement of about 13% kernel CPU time reduction compared to the original baseline.
